title: TOTP (Time-Based One-Time Password) Setup and Troubleshooting
text:
Q: How do I set up and troubleshoot TOTP for my account?
A: To set up TOTP, first, download a TOTP authenticator app such as Google Authenticator or Authy. Windows: Open your authenticator app and select 'Add Account' or the '+' icon. macOS: Similarly, open the app and click on 'Add Account' or the '+' icon. Next, log into your company account and navigate to the security settings. Look for 'Two-Factor Authentication' or 'TOTP Setup'. Windows: You may find this under 'Account Settings' > 'Security'. macOS: This can usually be found under 'Preferences' > 'Security'. Follow the prompts to generate a QR code. Scan the QR code with your authenticator app. Once scanned, the app will generate a 6-digit code. Enter this code back into your company account to verify the setup. If you encounter issues, ensure your device's time is set to automatic; Windows: Right-click the clock in the taskbar, select 'Adjust date/time', and toggle 'Set time automatically'. macOS: Go to 'System Preferences' > 'Date & Time' and check 'Set date and time automatically'. If problems persist, try reinstalling the authenticator app or contact IT support for further assistance.
